rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 8, 2012, line 1 - DEFENDANT STERLING SAVINGS BANK, A WASHINGTON STATE's Application For Osc Re: Contempt. Continue to June 19, 2012 to be heard by Judge Quidachay. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: RYAN HENDERSON VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 8, 2012, line 2 - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained in part and overruled in part. Overruled as to 1st to 5th causes of action. Sustained without leave to amend as to 6th cause of action. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: OLGA BIASOTTI VS. WILLIAM WEAVER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 8, 2012, line 3 - DEFENDANT WILLIAM WEAVER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend to allege in good faith whether defendant's tenancy is subject to SFRO. Complaint is uncertain paragraph 14 of complaint vs. EX. 1(a) to complaint. =(501/AJR)
